Hi Danilo. What is your main aim for this month?
My aim is to improve the data process. I am going to set a clear target for the team.
Nice. Are you going to launch the new pipeline this month?
Yes, very soon. The first milestone is the new report.
And the budget? Are you going to review it?
Yes. I intend to plan the budget with my manager next week.
Great. The upcoming weeks are going to be busy.
True. But I am not going to start a second project this month.
Good plan. What are you going to do first?
First, I am going to finish the report. Then we are going to launch together.

Are you going to finish the report this week?

Hi, I am Rachel. Let me tell you about my plans for this month. I have a clear aim: I am going to finish the new dashboard. My target is one hundred new users, and that is an important milestone for the team. Next week, we are going to launch a small update. I am also going to review the budget with my manager soon. In the upcoming weeks, I intend to learn more about our data tools. I am not going to take a long vacation this month, but I am going to rest for one weekend. It is a busy month, but I am ready.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me give an overview of my plans for this month. My main aim is to improve our data process. I am going to set a clear target for my team, and our first milestone is the new report. Soon, we are going to launch a better data pipeline. I am going to add one new analyst to my team in the upcoming weeks, so I intend to plan the budget carefully. I am not going to start a big project this month, because I want to finish the current one first. Every month is different, but I am going to do my best.
